_comment: yosys's SAT-based share pass explodes past 32 GB VM on the flattened 16-PE systolic array (OOM-killed twice). SYNTH_SHARE_RESOURCES is declared but NOT honored by openlane 2.3.10's pyosys script (run_pass('share') is unconditional); deferred_flatten makes the opt pipeline run per-module (167-cell PEs = trivial SAT) with flattening deferred to the ABC resynthesis step
